items.title: DOE announces $6B in loan guarantees for next-gen SMR deployments
items.summary: The U.S. Department of Energy expanded its Title XVII loan program to cover small modular reactor projects, with NuScale, Kairos Power, and X-energy among early applicants. The move signals federal commitment to nuclear as baseload clean energy.
items.curatedReason: DOE对SMR的$6B贷款担保是核能商业化的里程碑信号，直接影响NuCube等微堆创企的融资环境和估值逻辑。FOAK项目的资本缺口有望被系统性解决。

items.title: Form Energy begins construction on first 100-hour iron-air battery plant in West Virginia
items.summary: Form Energy broke ground on its Weirton manufacturing facility, the first commercial-scale plant for iron-air batteries capable of storing electricity for 100 hours at 1/10 the cost of lithium-ion for grid applications.
items.curatedReason: 铁-空气电池100小时储能+1/10锂电成本，如果Form Energy量产成功，将彻底改变长时储能的投资逻辑。从TRL到FOAK的跨越正在发生。

items.title: Brookfield closes $15B Global Transition Fund II, largest climate PE fund ever
items.summary: Brookfield Asset Management completed fundraising for its second energy transition fund at $15B, exceeding its $12.5B target. Focus areas include grid-scale storage, green hydrogen infrastructure, and industrial decarbonization.
items.curatedReason: Brookfield $15B超募说明机构资本加速流入能源转型。对FP关注的储能、绿氢赛道是直接利好，也验证了LP对CEH长周期资产的耐心。

items.title: EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism enters full enforcement phase
items.summary: Starting July 2026, EU importers must purchase CBAM certificates for embedded carbon in steel, cement, aluminum, fertilizers, electricity, and hydrogen. Trading partners including China and India prepare responses.
items.curatedReason: CBAM全面执行将重塑全球碳定价格局，对碳捕集、绿氢和低碳钢企业估值有直接拉动，也影响中欧贸易中工业品的合规成本结构。

items.title: Figure AI raises $675M Series B to scale humanoid robot manufacturing
items.summary: Figure AI closed a $675M Series B led by Microsoft and NVIDIA to build its first humanoid robot factory. Target applications include warehouse logistics, manufacturing assembly, and infrastructure construction.
items.curatedReason: Figure AI的巨额融资验证了物理AI/人形机器人赛道的热度。制造业和基础设施应用场景与CEH直接相关——机器人将加速FOAK项目建设。

items.title: Pivot Bio secures $430M for nitrogen-fixing microbe platform, replaces synthetic fertilizer
items.summary: Pivot Bio raised $430M in growth funding for its microbial nitrogen fixation technology that replaces 25-50% of synthetic fertilizer applications in corn and wheat, cutting N2O emissions by up to 40%.
items.curatedReason: 用微生物替代化肥是农业脱碳的关键路径。Pivot Bio的规模化验证对CEH中ag-foods赛道投资者是重要信号——减排+增产双重价值。
